Staging: Detective/mystery stuff doesn’t work 
real well in Paranoia (but Dashiell Hammett: style strong-atming does). Thinking about clues is hard work and slow-paced, and mysteries are real complicated plots, full of delails the GM doesn’t want to have to keep straight. So stick gratuitous gunfire and annoy- 
ing encounters in here and there, and if the PCs get tired of puzzling over the mystery, send in the berserk bot. It Came From Beneath HPL Sector 
Mission: Workmen on the new sewer project, tunneled into an ancient limestone cave. The workmen were later discovered scattered 
The term “garbage strike Troubleshooters 
throughout the sewer system, and citizens are complaining of strange dreams of a huge slithering, sentient mound of Foamy Organic LatticeYum. PCs are sent to investigate 
‘Complications: The sewers are yucky, Viscous liquids ooze down dank tunnels, Things dip. Things squish, Noxious smells and sights assault the senses. The PCs come across Sprawvied bodies of eviscerated workmen as they wander the tunnels, There's a gure, a thump — and the last character in line has disappeared, All of the PCs are.
